nodes.name: Webhook: Twilio Inbound
nodes.notes: Twilio POSTs incoming WhatsApp here. Expected form-encoded body: From, Body, MessageSid, NumMedia. For mock demo: send same fields as JSON. Configure Twilio Console -> Programmable Messaging -> WhatsApp Sandbox Settings -> 'When a message comes in' = https://<ngrok>.ngrok-free.app/webhook/twilio-inbound

nodes.name: HTTP: Lookup Lead by Phone
nodes.notes: Uses the migration 0015 RPC. Returns existing_lead_id, existing_name, existing_score, existing_stage, existing_created_at.

nodes.name: Gemini: Extract Intent
nodes.notes: Reuses the intent_extraction.md prompt structure. responseSchema enforces JSON shape; will return only fields mentioned in the reply.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify(Object.fromEntries(Object.entries($('Code: Parse Extracted Intent').first().json.extracted).filter(([k,v]) => v !== null && v !== undefined && v !== ''))) }}

nodes.name: HTTP: Update Lead Intent (no clobber)
nodes.notes: Supabase PATCH only updates the fields we send. The spec's no-clobber rule needs a DB trigger OR sentinel default; here we trust that the Lead Agent set explicit values for non-null fields. v2 enhancement: add an upsert RPC that respects 'do not overwrite if not null'.

nodes.name: Code: Debounce Check
nodes.notes: v1.1 Open Q1 answered: 5-min debounce per lead. Prevents Gemini 429 from chatty buyers.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ rescore_lead_id: $('Code: Debounce Check').first().json.leadId, trace_id: $('Code: Debounce Check').first().json.traceId, trigger_event: 'reply_received' }) }}

nodes.name: HTTP: Trigger Re-score
nodes.notes: v1.1 P0-2 acceptance: a reply triggers a new lead_scores row. Lead Agent will need a small branch to recognize rescore_lead_id and skip re-insert. For v1.1 demo, calling /webhook/new-lead with a marker is acceptable; production should have a dedicated /webhook/rescore-lead endpoint.

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $('Code: Known or Unknown').first().json.text, extracted_count: $('Code: Parse Extracted Intent').first().json.extractedCount }) }}
={{ 'Reply from ' + ($('Code: Known or Unknown').first().json.leadName || 'unknown') + ': ' + $('Code: Known or Unknown').first().json.text.slice(0,80) }}
={{ 'Extracted ' + $('Code: Parse Extracted Intent').first().json.extractedCount + ' fields, ' + ($('Code: Debounce Check').first().json.shouldRescore ? 're-scored' : 'debounced') }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, lead_id: $('Code: Known or Unknown').first().json.leadId, extracted_fields: $('Code: Parse Extracted Intent').first().json.extractedCount, rescored: $('Code: Debounce Check').first().json.shouldRescore }) }}

fieldValues.fieldValue: ={{ 'Unknown number ' + $('Code: Known or Unknown').first().json.phone + ': ' + $('Code: Known or Unknown').first().json.text.slice(0,80) }}
Dropped (no matching lead, v1.1 does not ghost-create)

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, dropped: true, reason: 'unknown_phone' }) }}
